full_text:
Liu Xi (Chengguo) 劉熙 (成國)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xi (劉熙), styledChengguo (成國), was born in Beihai. Scholar whose works include an important source for the theory of language in the Han period. Emigrated to the south and became a teacher.
